import re, unicodedata

# Normalization helpers
AR_TASHKEEL = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
TATWEEL = '\u0640'
PUNCT = re.compile(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]')  # keep Arabic letters and underscore/digits
SPACES = re.compile(r'\s+')

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = str(s)
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    # remove tashkeel
    s = AR_TASHKEEL.sub('', s)
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    # Optionally map ta marbuta to ha? We'll keep it as is.
    # remove punctuation
    s = PUNCT.sub(' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = SPACES.sub(' ', s).strip()
    return s

def token_set_ratio(a, b):
    # compute token-level F1 or Jaccard-like
    ta = set(normalize_ar(a).split())
    tb = set(normalize_ar(b).split())
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0
    inter = ta & tb
    precision = len(inter)/len(ta)
    recall = len(inter)/len(tb)
    if precision + recall == 0:
        f1 = 0.0
    else:
        f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)
    return f1

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # compute LCS length on normalized strings
    na = normalize_ar(a)
    nb = normalize_ar(b)
    # map to tokens or characters? We'll use characters for robust similarity
    # dynamic programming with optimization for memory may be heavy; strings are small.
    la, lb = len(na), len(nb)
    # Use DP O(n*m) okay for small strings. But b may be long (hadith), so maybe use smaller: compute longest common substring? Not LCS.
    # We'll compute length of longest common subsequence (LCS) ratio of min length.
    # But hadith texts are long; LCS may be too big to compute for all. We'll compute a simpler: longest common substring length using suffix? We'll implement simple O(n*m) DP for substring to keep quick.
    dp = [[0]*(lb+1) for _ in range(la+1)]
    best = 0
    for i in range(1, la+1):
        ai = na[i-1]
        for j in range(1, lb+1):
            if ai == nb[j-1]:
                dp[i][j] = dp[i-1][j-1] + 1
                if dp[i][j] > best:
                    best = dp[i][j]
            else:
                dp[i][j] = 0
    return best, na, nb

def longest_common_substring_ratio(a, b):
    best, na, nb = lcs_length(a, b)
    denom = max(len(na), len(nb)) or 1
    return best/denom

def contains_substring(a, b):
    # check if normalized a is substring of normalized b
    na = normalize_ar(a)
    nb = normalize_ar(b)
    return na in nb

# Prepare hadith texts list
def get_hadith_text(item):
    return item.get('Matn') if item.get('Matn') else item.get('hadithTxt') or ''

len([h for h in hadith if get_hadith_text(h)])

original = "التوكل على الله تعالى هو القناعة بالله تعالى وبالوعد الذي وعد به"
snippet = "التوكل على...لذي وعد به"

# Search occurrences where normalized original span is substring of hadith text
hits_exact = []
for i,h in enumerate(hadith):
    text = get_hadith_text(h)
    if not text:
        continue
    if contains_substring(original, text):
        hits_exact.append((i, h, text))

len(hits_exact)

# Search for hadith containing key phrases
def search_for_phrase(phrase):
    results = []
    na = normalize_ar(phrase)
    for i,h in enumerate(hadith):
        text = get_hadith_text(h)
        nb = normalize_ar(text)
        if na in nb:
            results.append((i, h, text))
    return results

len(res_tawakkul)

candidate_verse = "وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ ۚ وَمَنْ يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ ۚ إِنَّ اللَّهَ بَالِغُ أَمْرِهِ ۚ قَدْ جَعَلَ اللَّهُ لِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدْرًا"

# Find best similarity to the original among all hadith texts
orig = original
best = None
for i,h in enumerate(hadith):
    text = get_hadith_text(h) or ''
    # Quick filter: contain a word related to tawakkul or promise or contentment
    nt = normalize_ar(text)
    if all(word not in nt for word in ['توكل','يتوكل','توكلوا','توكله','قناعة','قنع','وعد']):
        continue

    if (best is None) or (score > best[0]):
